summary: Start M7-AUDIO-ART-LOCALIZATION-COMPLETE-001 as the next dependency-ready M7 content-lock-chain task after tutorial/encyclopedia closure. Save/cloud boundaries remain dependency-ready but unstarted.
acceptance_criteria: Define and complete the Beta audio, art, and localization coverage list required for content lock, or explicitly mark nonblocking post-1.0 gaps before formal lock acceptance.

All culture-specific visual, language, music, naming, and symbol choices are traceable to review records and route major cultural risk to historical_researcher and Human Gate instead of defaulting to certainty.
Localization coverage includes the contracted UI/tutorial/hints/encyclopedia strings and supported locale matrix, with stable keys and no hidden runtime string generation.

Audio and art integration remains static-resource based; no paid service, remote asset pipeline, secrets, telemetry, CDN/release commitment, or new production dependency is introduced without separate approval.
Completion evidence includes asset/reference manifests, localization checks, viewport smoke, and reviewer-visible unresolved risk list.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M7-AUDIO-ART-LOCALIZATION-COMPLETE-001
decisions: Formal content lock remains a future Human Gate; this task may prepare evidence but must not accept the lock.
Major culture-specific visual/language/music/naming/symbol decisions must route to historical_researcher and Human Gate if unresolved.
Static-resource boundary only: no paid service, remote asset pipeline, secrets, telemetry, CDN/release commitment, account/cloud/server/multiplayer, or new production dependency without approval.
risks: Task is R4 because culture-facing assets/localization can create historical/cultural risk.
Unrelated untracked docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains outside this task scope.
requested_action: Implement within allowed paths and return writer REVIEW handoff to historical_researcher.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for task and route files

tests_run.result: No whitespace errors after start update.
